subject: [PATCH v3 1/3] iova: convert from rbtree to maple tree

2026-06-03.patch_summary: This patch replaces the hand-rolled red-black tree in the IOVA allocator with a Maple tree, a B-tree variant designed for range tracking and gap searching. The change reduces memory usage per IOVA entry from approximately 64 bytes to around 44-57 bytes, while also improving search performance by reducing the search depth to O(log_10 n). Additionally, the patch simplifies the code by eliminating the need for retry loops and successor gap fixups.
